zh.Pulford, Broxley Hundred, Cheshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭爾普爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Pulford於1174年1月8日出生在英國爾普爾福德時，他的父親Richard Hammond de Pulford24歲，母親Margery Frodsham15歲。他於1215年與Emma of Cheshire在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.Pulford, Broxley Hundred, Cheshire, Engl: 英国英格兰爾普爾福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Pulford于1174年1月8日出生在英国爾普爾福德时，他的父亲Richard Hammond de Pulford24岁，母亲Margery Frodsham15岁。他于1215年与Emma of Cheshire在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1240年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pulford in Cheshire, so called from Old English pōl ‘pool, pond’ or perhaps pull ‘pool, creek’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Pulford was born on 8 January 1174, in Pulford, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard Hammond de Pulford, was 24 and his mother, Margery Frodsham, was 15. He married Emma of Cheshire in 1215, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1240, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Pulford est né le 8 janvier 1174, à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hammond de Pulford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margery Frodsham, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Emma of Cheshire en 1215, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1240, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Pulford am 8. Januar 1174 in Pulford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hammond de Pulford 24 und seine Mutter Margery Frodsham 15. Er hat 1215 in England Emma of Cheshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1240 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Pulford è nato il il 8 gennaio 1174 nel Pulford, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Hammond de Pulford, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margery Frodsham, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Emma of Cheshire nel 1215, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1240, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Pulford, Broxley Hundred, Cheshire, Engl: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Pulfordが1174年1月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Hammond de Pulfordは24歳，母Margery Frodshamは15歳であった。1215年にイギリスでEmma of Cheshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Pulford(이)가 1174년 1월 8일 영국 체실르 풀퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hammond de Pulford(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Frodsham(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1215년 영국에서 Emma of Cheshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Pulford, Broxley Hundred, Cheshire, Engl: Pulford, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Pulford nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1174, em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hammond de Pulford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margery Frodsham, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma of Cheshire em 1215, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1240, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Pulford родился 8 января 1174 г. в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hammond de Pulford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Frodsham, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma of Cheshire в 1215 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1240 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Pulford nació el 8 de enero de 1174, en Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hammond de Pulford, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margery Frodsham, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Emma of Cheshire en 1215, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1240, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
